exam_en: A pintle is a pin or bolt, usually inserted into a gudgeon, which is used as part of a pivot or hinge. Other applications include pintle and lunette ring for towing, and pintle pins securing casters in furniture.
exam_ko: 핀틀은 핀 또는 볼트로, 일반적으로 피봇이나 힌지의 부품으로 굴대꼭지(gudgeon)에 삽입된다. 기타 응용 분야로는 견인 용 핀틀 및 루넷 링, 가구의 캐스터를 고정하는 핀틀 핀이 있다.

exam_en: Intumescent coatings work by charring and expanding in the presence of extreme heat. The increase in volume and subsequent decrease in density slows the heating of the substrate, increasing the time before the steel itself begins to melt. Intumescents typically swell to 25 times their original thickness when engulfed in flames. This expansion allows them to provide a barrier between the flames and the steel that is exponentially larger than a coating that does not swell.
exam_ko: 내화도료는 극심한 열에 탄화 및 팽창한다. 부피의 증가 및 그에 따른 밀도 감소는 바탕면의 가열을 늦추고, 강철 자체가 녹기 시작하는 시간을 늦춘다. 팽창성 도료는 일반적으로 화염에 둘러 싸일때 25배까지 팽창한다. 이러한 팽창은 불꽃과 강철사이에 팽창하지 않는 도료보다 기하급수적으로 큼 장벽을 제공할 수 있게 한다.

exam_en: Document on international best practices, local similar initiatives and lessons learned and develop community action programs streamlined to Eco-district approach.

exam_en: The vertical members of the frame are called stiles while the horizontal members are known as rails. A basic frame and panel item consists of a top rail, a bottom rail, two stiles, and a panel. exam_en: However, NRM1 then goes on to give a second, slightly different definition: ‘Where the external works is to be measured separately, the site area (SA) is to be measured. The SA is the total area of the site within the site title boundaries (or the total area within the site title boundaries defined by the employer as the site for the building or buildings), excluding the footprint of the new building(s), measured on a horizontal plane.
exam_ko: 그러나 NRM1은 약간 다른 정의를 제공합니다. 외부 작업을 개별적으로 측정해야하는 경우 대지 면적을 측정해야 한다. 대지면적 (SA) 수평면에서 새 건물의 차지하는 공간을 제외한 대지의 소유증서의 대지 경계내에 대지 전체 면적이다. (또는 사용자가 건물의 대지로 정의한 대지의 소유증서의 경계 내의 전체 면적)

exam_en: All modifications or revisions to submittals and shop drawings must be clouded, with an appropriate revision number clearly indicated. The following shall automatically be considered cause for rejection of the modification or revision whether or not the drawing has been approved by the Design Professionals: a. Failure to specifically cloud modifications b. Unapproved revisions to previous submittals c. Unapproved departure from Contract Documents

exam_en: If at any time the total number of shop drawings received in any one week period exceeds the amount in the approved schedule by more than 10% for that week, the Design Professionals have the right to add two days to the average turnaround time for each 20% increment in excess of the scheduled quantity for that week's submissions.
exam_ko: 1주일 동안 접수된 총 샵 도면이 해당주에 승인된 일정의 10%이상 초과한 경우, 설계 전문가는 해당주의 제출에 대한 예정된 양의 초과되는 각각의 20%증가분에 대해 평균 처리 시간을 2일씩 더할 권리가 있다.

exam_en: Design Architect will notify Contractor through Design-Builder of acceptance or rejection of proposed substitution within 15 days of receipt of substitution request, or seven days of receipt of additional information or documentation, whichever is later.
